news.headline: DartSolar LLC introduces solar roof rack offering 10-20 miles/day, 1,000 watts stationary, 360 watts moving.
news.summary: A revolutionary solar roof rack has been developed by DartSolar LLC, offering a daily charge range of 10 to 20 miles. This innovatively designed rack can expand to provide 1,000 watts of power when stationary and retract to 360 watts during operation. The company based in Los Angeles has recently announced the launch of this cutting-edge product.

news.headline: 76% of adults 35-65+ are open to holiday temp shifts, with 74% willing to work 1-19 hours weekly per survey.
news.summary: A survey conducted recently revealed that 74% of Americans are open to spending 1-19 hours each week on temporary holiday work. In Austin, Texas, on December 9, 2024, it was reported that over two-thirds of Americans, accounting for 68%, are contemplating taking on additional shifts during the winter season (67%) in order to have immediate access to income and earn extra money.

news.headline: Workbox opens 11th U.S. location in downtown Pittsburgh at One PPG Place Tower on the 31st floor.
news.summary: A popular coworking company, Workbox, known for its member-focused approach, is set to launch its 11th location in the United States. This new site will be situated in the iconic One PPG Place Tower in Pittsburgh. The workspace operator aims to cater to the needs of expanding businesses by offering essential resources and support. The location will be on the 31st floor of One PPG, providing a prime setting for professionals.

news.headline: BoE's Ramsden: Hedge fund interested in becoming the UK's primary dealer.
Bitcoin thief Razzlekhan's new song reflects on missing partner pre-sentencing; involved in Bitfinex hack.
news.summary: Heather “Razzlekhan” Morgan, the Bitcoin thief, has released a new track where she expresses longing for her partner prior to their sentencing. The song touches on the emotions surrounding their impending legal outcome.

news.headline: Sales Focus Inc. publishes white paper "How to Thrive in the Era of Virtual Customer Acquisition" in Charleston, offering future sales insights.
news.summary: Sales Focus Inc. recently published a detailed white paper titled "Navigating Virtual Sales for Success" to assist businesses in adapting to the changing landscape of sales. The document, titled "How to Thrive in the Era of Virtual Customer Acquisition," provides valuable insights for companies looking to excel in virtual sales. It was released on December 9, 2024, in Charleston, South Carolina. Sales Focus Inc. (SFI), a pioneer in sales outsourcing, aims to help businesses boost their sales performance in the digital age through this informative white paper.

news.headline: Over 50% of spots at top US colleges are reserved for early applicants, sparking concerns about reduced opportunities.
news.summary: In Brookline, Massachusetts, a recent study reveals that more than half of the available admission openings at leading American universities are currently set aside for Early Decision (ED), Early Action (EA), and Restrictive Early Action (REA) candidates. This pattern results in a significantly limited...

news.headline: Israeli politician Smotrich sees opportunity with Trump to topple Iran.
Market unfazed by Syria's al-Assad overthrow as traders focus on global growth concerns & oversupply issues.
news.summary: The focus of traders seemed to be on sluggish worldwide growth and excess supply from other producers rather than the removal of Bashar al-Assad.

news.headline: Twickenham House reopens on Dec 14th & Jan 4th after Hurricane Helene, a popular venue in Western NC.
news.summary: In Jefferson, North Carolina, Twickenham House will be welcoming the public on December 14th and January 4th. This renowned wedding and event venue located in Western North Carolina is excited to announce its complete reopening after facing significant challenges.

news.headline: Auction on Dec. 10-13 to feature rare items including gold-plated Colt AR-15 machine gun, Irish arms, firearms, knives.
news.summary: A rare gold-plated Colt AR-15 machine gun from the 1960s was gifted to JFK's Chief of Staff, Kenneth Smith, joining the notable Irish arms collection of Smith-Christmas. The firearm is a part of the Jim Cyr and Frank Brownell collections, showcased in DENVER, Pa. The presentation took place on December 9, 2024, drawing attention from enthusiasts and collectors with a passion for high-quality antique pieces.

news.headline: CBRE's CEO to present at Goldman Sachs Financial Services Conference on Dec 11, 2024, 8am ET. Live webcast available.
news.summary: CBRE disclosed that their Chair and CEO, Bob Sulentic, is set to engage in a fireside chat at the Goldman Sachs Financial Services Conference on December 11, 2024. The session is slated for 8 am ET. An available live audio webcast of the talk will be reachable through the Investor Relations segment of CBRE's website at www.cbre.com. Following the event, an audio replay of the webcast will be uploaded within 24 hours.

news.headline: Designer Brands Inc. (NYSE:DBI) is projected to report Q3 earnings at 35 cents/share on $802.14M revenue. Analysts expect a rise from last year's 24 cents/share. Maintain steady stock growth and dividends.
news.summary: Designer Brands Inc. (NYSE:DBI) is set to report its third-quarter earnings on Tuesday, Dec. 10. Analysts predict earnings to be 35 cents per share, a significant increase from 24 cents per share in the same period last year. The company is expected to announce quarterly revenue of around $802.14 million, up from $786.33 million a year ago. Telsey Advisory Group analyst Dana Telsey has maintained Designer Brands with a Market Perform rating and set a price target of $6. Additionally, the company currently offers an annual dividend yield of 3.44%. Designer Brands is the parent company of Designer Shoe Warehouse and Topo Athletic.

news.headline: Social Media Management Market to hit $51.8 billion by 2027, growing from $17.5 billion in 2022, led by IBM and Cisco.
news.summary: The Social Media Management Market is expected to experience significant growth, with projections indicating an increase from USD 17.5 billion in 2022 to USD 51.8 billion by 2027 at a CAGR of 24.2%. The market dynamics driving this growth include a focus on competitive intelligence, ROI for social media strategies, enhanced customer experience management, and increased user engagement via smartphones. However, there are challenges such as regulatory constraints and workflow complexities. Opportunities lie in data generation from social media, cloud adoption, and high SME adoption rates. Key companies in this market include Adobe, IBM, Google, Oracle, and Salesforce, among others.

news.headline: LLS honors 6 scientists for blood cancer research at ASH annual meeting. Elvin Wagenblast studies blood cells transformation to leukemia.
news.summary: In San Diego on December 9, 2024, Dr. Elvin Wagenblast is utilizing advanced genetic technologies to analyze blood cells and uncover the transition from normal function to pre-leukemia and ultimately leukemia. The research, conducted by Dr. Wagenblast, focuses on understanding the progression of leukemia.

news.headline: First wave energy grid-connected array in the Middle East opened by Eco Wave Power and EDF Renewables IL in Israel, exporting electricity to the country's power grid.
news.summary: Israel's Minister of Energy and Infrastructure, Eli Cohen, along with Minister of Environmental Protection Idit Silman and Tel Aviv-Jaffa Mayor Ron Huldai, officially inaugurated the Wave Energy Project by Eco Wave Power and EDF Renewables IL. The project has commenced exporting electricity to Israel's power grid.

news.headline: National Pawnbrokers Association celebrates National Pawnbroker Day on Dec 6, 2024, honoring their community role.
news.summary: On December 6th, the National Pawnbrokers Association (NPA) celebrated National Pawnbroker Day to acknowledge the vital contributions of pawnbrokers in their communities. The NPA annually recognizes this day to honor the important role played by pawnbrokers in providing essential financial services and offering support to the local economy. Established in 2024, this day serves as a reminder of the significance of pawnbrokers, with the NPA leading the initiatives to raise awareness about the positive impacts of their services. Through their operations, pawnbrokers assist countless individuals in accessing quick funds, showcasing their dedication and commitment to assisting the community.

news.headline: BriteCap Financial, a non-bank lender, appoints Dave Lafferty as Chief Credit Officer, with 30 years of experience.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on December 9, 2024, BriteCap Financial LLC (BriteCap), a reputable non-bank lender offering quick, convenient, and cost-effective working capital to small businesses, disclosed the selection of Dave Lafferty as their new Chief Credit Officer. With over three decades of experience in the industry, Dave's appointment marks a significant move for BriteCap.

news.headline: Handel's Ice Cream celebrates 150th opening in Atlanta with free ice cream for a year to first 150 guests.
news.summary: Handel’s Ice Cream, a renowned ice cream brand established in 1945, is excited to announce the opening of its 150th location at Buckhead Landing in Greater Atlanta. This marks a significant expansion for the brand in a thriving market. To celebrate this milestone, Handel’s is offering Free Ice Cream for a Year* to the first 150 customers. The brand's rapid growth has garnered substantial attention, solidifying its position as one of the fastest-growing concepts in the country.

news.headline: Lucky Strike Entertainment opens new Beverly Hills location in Beverly Center.
news.summary: Lucky Strike Entertainment has recently unveiled the inauguration of Lucky Strike Beverly Hills in the Beverly Center, Richmond, Virginia.

news.headline: XRP could hit $5 soon. 3 charts show the rally is not done. Correction is a chance for whales. Opportunity to rise.
news.summary: The data on XRP's price indicates that the ongoing correction presents a valuable opportunity for large investors to buy at lower prices. Furthermore, it points towards the potential for the altcoin to see further increases in value.

news.headline: Innovative Solutions & Support to announce Q4 2024 results on December 19th in a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: In Exton, Pennsylvania, Innovative Solutions & Support, Inc. (Nasdaq: ISSC) revealed plans to release their fourth quarter 2024 results on December 19, 2024, following the market's closure. They will conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes, address recent developments, and engage in a Q&A session. Interested parties can access a webcast of the conference call and related materials.

news.headline: Omnicell introduces OmniSphere, a cloud-native software workflow engine integrating solutions across care settings.
news.summary: Announced in Fort Worth, Texas, the latest advancement from Omnicell is OmniSphere, a cutting-edge cloud-native software workflow engine. This innovative technology aims to seamlessly integrate Omnicell solutions across various care settings. This next-generation platform is designed to enhance connectivity and efficiency within the healthcare industry.

news.headline: RXO (NYSE: RXO) won the 2024 Top Software & Tech award for its visual AI technology optimizing gate check-in process.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, RXO (NYSE: RXO), specializing in asset-light transportation solutions, has been honored as a recipient of the 2024 Top Software & Tech award from Supply and Demand Chain Executive and Food Logistics. Recognizing their visual AI technology for gate check-in, introduced towards the end of 2023, the award showcases RXO's innovation in streamlining data collection upon trucks' arrival at facilities. The AI-powered system aims to automate the check-in process, enhancing efficiency in warehouses and distribution centers.

news.headline: Porch Group confirms $32 million Q4'24 Adj EBITDA guidance, reports on Investor Day highlights.
news.summary: In Seattle, Porch Group has restated its guidance for Q4 2024, with an expected adjusted EBITDA of $32 million. The company also recently shared key highlights from its Investor Day.

news.headline: Consumer housing sentiment rises by 0.4 points to 75.0 in November, driven by increased optimism on falling mortgage rates.
news.summary: The rise in confidence is primarily fueled by growing optimism that mortgage rates will decrease. According to the latest report released on December 9, 2024, the Fannie Mae Home Purchase Sentiment Index® (HPSI) saw a 0.4 point uptick in November, reaching 75.0. This marks a significant upward trajectory observed over the previous year.

news.headline: Carisma Therapeutics restructures to focus on in vivo macrophage engineering, discontinues CT-0525, and reduces workforce by 34%.
news.summary: Carisma Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: CARM) located in Philadelphia is shifting its resources to emphasize the in vivo macrophage engineering platform for developing therapies related to fibrosis, oncology, and autoimmune diseases. The company has decided to discontinue the development of CT-0525 as part of this realignment. As a result, Carisma Therapeutics will be reducing its workforce by 34%.

news.headline: SLB launches AI-driven Neuro™ geosteering for more efficient drilling, reducing carbon footprint. (Numbers: NYSE: SLB)
news.summary: In Houston, a global energy technology company, SLB, has launched Neuro™ autonomous geosteering technology aimed at enhancing drilling efficiency and reducing the carbon footprint. Listed on NYSE as SLB, this innovative solution utilizes AI to analyze real-time subsurface data and direct the drill bit towards the most productive layer, known as the "sweet spot." By adapting to subsurface complexities, it creates more efficient and high-performing wells.

news.headline: Sauron introduces revolutionary home security system with military-grade technology, offering real-time 360° view of homes.
news.summary: A firm has implemented a military-grade perception and deterrence framework to present a live 360-degree overview of households, delivering a highly advanced security option in the market. This innovative perceptual home security system revolutionizes the concept of security by incorporating state-of-the-art artificial intelligence and sophisticated technology.

news.headline: Forum Energy Technologies is buying back $75 million of its own stock and completing sale-leaseback transactions.
news.summary: Houston-based company Forum Energy Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: FET) has revealed plans for a share repurchase program. The company's Board of Directors has approved the program, allowing for the buyback of FET’s common stock worth a total of $75 million. The repurchase of shares will occur periodically at prices deemed suitable by FET, taking into account market conditions, legal regulations, and other relevant factors.

news.headline: Richard Bernstein Advisors (RBA) named in Pensions & Investments Best Places to Work for fourth year in a row.
news.summary: In the annual Best Places to Work in Money Management awards announced by Pensions & Investments today, Richard Bernstein Advisors (RBA) has been acknowledged for the fourth year in a row in the year 2024. This prestigious honor highlights RBA's commitment to providing an exceptional work environment.

news.headline: EnergyHub acquires Finnish company Kapacity.io to boost demand-side flexibility in Europe.
news.summary: A prominent European company specializing in heat pump optimization and flexibility, Kapacity.io, has recently been purchased by EnergyHub, the leading provider of residential flexibility solutions in North America. With this acquisition, Kapacity.io will maintain its emphasis on forming new collaborations with electricity retailers and heat pump manufacturers in order to capitalize on residential flexibility advantages for consumers. EnergyHub's vast resources and expertise will support Kapacity.io in this endeavor.

news.headline: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. plans to repurchase $500 million worth of common stock as authorized by its Board of Directors.
news.summary: In Pasadena, California on December 9, 2024, Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) revealed its approval by the Board of Directors of a common stock repurchase initiative. This program allows the Company to buy back a significant amount of its own shares up to a certain value.

news.headline: New Fortress Energy completes private exchange of $1.5 billion new senior secured notes, part of $2.7 billion issuance.
news.summary: New Fortress Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: NFE) successfully completed a private exchange of $1.5 billion in new senior secured notes, representing over two-thirds of the total outstanding senior secured notes due in 2026 and 2029. This exchange marks the final stage of the Company's issuance of $2.7 billion in new senior secured notes expiring in 2029. These notes will now be traded collectively as a single class.

news.headline: SolarEdge introduces 'USA Edition' Home Battery, expanding domestic content portfolio, qualifying for Domestic Content Bonus Credit. #CleanEnergy
news.summary: SolarEdge Technologies Inc., a leading smart energy technology company based in Milpitas, California, disclosed today that they have begun shipping the new SolarEdge Home Battery 'USA Edition'. This product marks the final addition to their range of solar and storage solutions produced in the U.S. and is eligible for the Domestic Content Bonus Credit, following guidelines set by the U.S. Department of Treasury and the Internal Revenue Service. The SolarEdge Home Battery 'USA Edition' is now available for purchase, showcasing the company's commitment to domestically manufactured energy products.

news.headline: Hudson Valley Property Group bought 22 affordable housing properties with 4,768 units across four Western states.
news.summary: A total of 4,768 affordable housing units have been acquired by Hudson Valley Property Group (HVPG), a prominent national company specializing in affordable housing preservation. These properties are situated in California, Colorado, Idaho, and Washington across a portfolio of 22 properties. This investment was confirmed on December 9, 2024, in Seattle.

news.headline: Roundhill's 0DTE Covered Call ETFs hit $1B AUM. XDTE, QDTE, RDTE pay weekly distributions. Dec. 9, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: Roundhill Investments has recently launched XDTE, QDTE, and RDTE, which are groundbreaking ETFs offering zero-days-to-expiry (0DTE) options for the first time. These ETFs aim to generate income and offer weekly distributions to investors. The launch took place in New York on December 9, 2024, marking a significant milestone in the ETF market.

news.headline: Post Holdings reports avian influenza at third-party facility; affirms FY 2025 adjusted EBITDA outlook.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Post Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: POST), a company in the consumer packaged goods sector, announced details about an avian influenza outbreak at a contracted egg-laying facility of Michael Foods. They assured that this incident would not impact their non-GAAP financial outlook.

news.headline: Maria Bocanegra appointed president of Peoples Gas and North Shore Gas by WEC Energy Group, effective Jan. 2, 2025.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, WEC Energy Group shared that Maria Bocanegra, who served as the chief legal and government relations officer at the Port of Cleveland, is set to become the president of Peoples Gas and North Shore Gas starting from January 2, 2025. Maria's appointment as president signifies a shift in leadership roles within WEC Energy Group. This move reflects the company's strategic plans and aligns with its goals for future growth and development. Maria's experience and expertise will be crucial in guiding Peoples Gas and North Shore Gas towards achieving their objectives.

news.headline: Crown Labs and Revance merge in new agreement. Crown is a skincare leader, Revance a biotech company (NASDAQ: RVNC).
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Crown Laboratories, Inc. ("Crown"), based in Johnson City, Tennessee, and Revance Therapeutics, Inc. ("Revance"), located in Nashville, Tennessee, announced a partnership. Crown is a prominent player in the skincare sector worldwide, while Revance is a biotechnology company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol RVNC. The collaboration aims to combine their expertise and resources to revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: ClearSign Technologies (Nasdaq: CLIR) complies with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement. Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, on December 9, 2024, ClearSign Technologies Corporation (Nasdaq: CLIR) announced advancements in industrial combustion and sensing technologies aimed at promoting decarbonization and enhancing operational efficiency. The company is recognized for its efforts to utilize innovative technologies that drive energy efficiency and decarbonization initiatives.

news.headline: Thai Airways increases partnership with Sabre, adopting advanced fare management solutions, boosting global travel industry.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Sabre Corporation (NASDAQ: SABR), a prominent software and technology provider in the global travel industry, declared an enhancement of its enduring partnership with Thai Airways in Singapore and Bangkok. The collaboration aims to further bolster services provided by the national carrier of Thailand.

news.headline: PTC names Robert Dahdah as Chief Revenue Officer, joining from Microsoft. Dec. 9, 2024. Dahdah was Corporate VP at Microsoft.
news.summary: In Boston on December 9, 2024, PTC revealed that Robert Dahdah has been named the Executive Vice President and Chief Revenue Officer. Dahdah, previously the Corporate Vice President of Global Healthcare and Life Sciences at Microsoft, has joined PTC. PTC is listed on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol PTC.

news.headline: College Consensus showcases holiday traditions at colleges across the US in a heartwarming article. Published on Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: In Hillsborough, North Carolina on December 9, 2024, a recent article by College Consensus has highlighted various holiday traditions of colleges and universities in the United States. With winter setting in nationwide, the article showcases the festive customs that are cherished across campuses. For more information, visit www.collegeconsensus.com.

news.headline: Renowned artist Roxana Frontini presented "EVOLVED" at Art Basel Miami 2024, captivating crowds at Miami Design District.
news.summary: In Miami on December 9, 2024, celebrated artist Roxana Frontini welcomed art lovers and intrigued attendees of Art Basel Miami to witness "EVOLVED," an innovative performance art installation exploring the concept of human evolution by abandoning obsolete perceptions.

news.headline: LSPedia named to Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business list for Software as a Service. Recognition for industry excellence.
news.summary: LSPedia has proudly secured a spot on the prestigious Inc. 2024 Best in Business list in the Software as a Service category. This annual list highlights top companies in their respective industries for excellence. The selection showcases LSPedia's industry-leading performance and dedication to providing superior SaaS solutions. This recognition, received on December 9, 2024, further solidifies LSPedia's position as one of the best in the business.

news.headline: SkyDefense LLC unveils CobraJet, AI-enabled eVTOL interceptor in Brighton, CO, to neutralize enemy drones.
news.summary: Brighton, Colorado, on December 9, 2024 - Today, SkyDefense LLC revealed the launch of their latest innovation, "CobraJet", an AI-powered eVTOL interceptor. This cutting-edge autonomous jet, based in Brighton, Colorado, is equipped with advanced technology and powered by batteries. It is designed to detect, track, identify, and neutralize enemy drones over extended distances. This innovative solution marks a significant milestone in drone defense technology, offering enhanced capabilities for safeguarding against aerial threats.

news.headline: Corporate pension funding improved by $5 billion in November, with funded ratio rising from 103.2% to 103.5%. Plan assets increased to $1.338 trillion.
news.summary: In Seattle, Milliman, Inc., a leading global consulting and actuarial firm, unveiled the findings of its recent Milliman 100 Pension Funding Index (PFI) report. The analysis focused on the top 100 U.S. corporate pension plans, revealing an increase in funded ratio from 103.2% in October to 103.5% by November 30. The surge was primarily propelled by robust monthly investment returns of 1.88%, which raised the market value of plan assets by $18 billion to a total of $1.338 trillion.

news.headline: UK's Chancellor Reeves: It is in the national interest to have more normal trade with the EU.
Safety Shot (Nasdaq: SHOT) launches Sure Shot supplement on large US big-box store's e-commerce site for wider reach.
news.summary: In Jupiter, Florida, on Dec. 09, 2024, Safety Shot, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHOT) revealed that its novel alcohol-reducing dietary supplement, Sure Shot, can now be bought on a prominent e-commerce platform. The platform is affiliated with one of the major big-box retailers in the US, renowned for its vast online reach and distribution channels. This move into online retail signifies a pivotal advancement in Safety Shot's expansion plan, enhancing its market presence and offering customers increased convenience in purchasing its products.
